test_invitation.title: Group Invitation Notification Test
test_invitation.group_id_help: Group ID that will be used to send test invitations
test_invitation.email_help: Enter the email that will receive the group invitation

instructions.0: Enter a target email that is already registered in the system
instructions.1: The system will create a group invitation notification
instructions.2: Log in with the target account on the notifications page
instructions.3: View the invitation notification and test the Accept/Reject buttons
